inputs.label: Urgency Score (1-10)
inputs.businessContext: Rating of how urgent the task is, 1 being not urgent, 10 extremely urgent.

businessContext_i18n.en: Rating of how urgent the task is, 1 being not urgent, 10 extremely urgent.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Görevin ne kadar acil olduğunu değerlendirin, 1 hiç acil değil, 10 son derece acil.

inputs.label: Importance Score (1-10)
inputs.businessContext: Rating of how important the task is, 1 being not important, 10 extremely important.

businessContext_i18n.en: Rating of how important the task is, 1 being not important, 10 extremely important.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Görevin ne kadar önemli olduğunu değerlendirin, 1 hiç önemli değil, 10 son derece önemli.

inputs.label: Urgency Weight
inputs.businessContext: Weight assigned to urgency in the priority score calculation. Typically between 0 and 1.

businessContext_i18n.en: Weight assigned to urgency in the priority score calculation. Typically between 0 and 1.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Öncelik puanı hesaplamasında aciliyete atanan ağırlık. Genellikle 0 ile 1 arasında.

inputs.label: Importance Weight
inputs.businessContext: Weight assigned to importance in the priority score calculation. Typically between 0 and 1.

businessContext_i18n.en: Weight assigned to importance in the priority score calculation. Typically between 0 and 1.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Öncelik puanı hesaplamasında öneme atanan ağırlık. Genellikle 0 ile 1 arasında.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
